payload.title: Retire LAN hub self-healing; cloud healthcheck + LB topology
payload.description: Document and remove single-host self-healing in src/hub.js (port-race binding, probeHub, Bonjour/mDNS, startHubWatchdog, discovery file) for the cloud deployment. Add /healthz asserting DB reachability + live LISTEN connection. Specify LB requirements for long-lived SSE: no response buffering, idle timeout > 20s keepalive, no sticky sessions. Coordinate with SCP-126. (From SCP-125.)
